query: SELECT id, title, cdnUrl, category, blockRef FROM media_catalogue WHERE title LIKE '%Database%' OR title LIKE '%Register%' OR title LIKE '%Vehicle%' OR title LIKE '%Legal%' OR title LIKE '%Block392%' OR title LIKE '%Block401%' LIMIT 20;
